action: He wakes before sunrise in his tent, lies still listening to the rhythm of waves and rustling palms.
thought: It's quieter here than anywhere else. That might be the point.

action: He moves across the beach in the pre-dawn light, surveying the island with a builder's eye, already planning where things could go.
thought: This place has potential. And so do I.

action: She walks barefoot to the water's edge and stands perfectly still, watching the first light touch the horizon.
thought: Everything here is honest. No pretense. Just being.

description: Ryan encounters Jade at the water's edge as the sun rises, and they share their first real conversation of the island.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Hey—oh, sorry. Didn't want to startle you.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: You didn't. I saw you coming.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I'm Ryan. Just exploring. Trying to get the lay of things.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: There's not much to sense. Just island.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Fair enough. I'm building a shelter actually. Something solid.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Where?

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Central. Wanted to be in the middle, in case. You live here?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: The hammock's mine.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: That's very... free.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: I don't like being tied down.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I just meant the hammock seemed—never mind. I get it.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: You're easy to read.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Is that bad?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Haven't decided yet.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: But you've decided to stay. That means something, right?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: This place is different. It's honest.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: And we're not?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Are you?

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I'm trying to be. I want to build something real here.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: A house.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Maybe more than that.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: You don't know me yet.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I know. That's what's interesting.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Most people get bored when they realize I'm not mysterious.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I'm not most people.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: No. You're not.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Is that good?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: I don't know. Ask me later.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I will. I promise.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: [silence as the sun breaks the horizon]

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: My name is Jade.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I know. You told me.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: I'm reminding you. In case you forget what this felt like.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I won't forget.

action: He stands at the edge of his tent, looking out toward the water where the sun is already warm.
He's working to reinforce the frame of his shelter, though his mind keeps drifting elsewhere.
thought: Can't stop thinking about her voice.

action: She walks along the shoreline, her feet finding patterns in the sand that lead nowhere particular.
thought: He listened like I was the only person alive.

description: Ryan is working on his shelter when Jade approaches from the path, and they sit together overlooking the water.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: You're awake early. Wondered if I'd see you.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Couldn't sleep. Too much sky, too many stars.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I know exactly what you mean. First night's always strange.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Is it strange for you too? You seem... settled.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Settled's a good word for what I'm trying. Not always working.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: What happens when it doesn't work?

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I usually panic a little, then fix it. Build something better.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: So you're a fixer. That makes sense with the house.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I'm trying to fix everything. Maybe that's my whole problem.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: What if some things aren't meant to be fixed?

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Like what? Give me an example.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Like... meeting someone you weren't planning to meet.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: You think I'm trying to fix what's happening with us?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: I think you're deciding it's something good before you know it.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Isn't that what hope is? Deciding something's good first?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Hope's dangerous. It breaks easy.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: So does everything else. Might as well risk it, then.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: That's one way to live. Bold and reckless.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: You're living it too, though. On an island with two strangers.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: That's different. That's just happening. I didn't choose it.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: But you could leave. You're choosing to stay.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Stay and see what happens. Very different than deciding it's good.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Okay. I hear the difference. Fair enough.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: But I'm glad I'm talking to you instead of... not.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: That's something. That's actually something.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Don't make it bigger than it is though.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I'll try. No promises though.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: At least you're honest about it. Marcus doesn't seem honest.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Marcus is... he's got his reasons for being closed off.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Do you know his reasons? Does he trust you with them?

action: He arrives at the freshwater stream to collect water, finding Ryan and Jade already there in conversation.
thought: They move through here like they own it.

action: He's showing Jade how to filter water through cloth, leaning close enough that their shoulders almost touch.
thought: She makes everything simple. He ruins it.

action: She sits by the water's edge, listening intently to Ryan, unaware of the weight shifting in the air.
thought: Something shifted when he arrived. Everything stopped.

description: At the water source, Marcus arrives to find Ryan and Jade in an easy conversation, creating an uncomfortable triangle.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: The water here is cleaner than yesterday. Less sandy.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Everything tastes different when you gather it yourself.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Right? Like we're actually part of the place. Not just passing through.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: I think I understand why people live simply. It's... honest.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: Water's water. Necessary.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Marcus. Come fill up. We were just talking about—

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: I can see what you were doing.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: We're just talking. There's no one else here.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: That's the problem, isn't it.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: What's the problem? We're all getting water. No conflict.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: I didn't say conflict. I said it's a problem.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: I don't understand what the problem is.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: You wouldn't.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: That's not fair. She's trying to be nice.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: She doesn't know what you're trying.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: What is he talking about?

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: He's just in a mood. Don't listen to him.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: You want my respect more than you want honesty.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: That's not true. I just wanted you here.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Can't you two just... exist near each other?

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: We're existing. Peacefully.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: That's not peaceful. That's tense.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: Same thing out here.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: It doesn't have to be.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I agree with her. We're all new to this.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: Some of us more than others.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: You're always alone though. Even when we're together.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: That's by design.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: We could help each other.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: No. You help each other. I'll manage.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: You're not managing. You're just waiting.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: What's the difference.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: We'll figure it out. All three of us.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: You can try.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: That's something, at least.

action: He wades into the deeper water despite the warning pull of the current, testing his limits as he always does.
thought: I'm deeper than I should be. This current.

action: He's gathering coconuts at the tree line, oblivious to the danger unfolding at the water's edge.
thought: I keep watching her. I can't look away.

action: She's swimming in the shallows when she spots Marcus caught in the riptide, his body suddenly fighting against the current.
thought: He's going down. I'm the only one here.

description: At the water's edge, Marcus gets caught in a riptide while swimming. Jade sees him struggling and instinctively dives in. Ryan watches in horror as it unfolds.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: The current... stronger than expected.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Marcus! Stay calm, I'm coming!

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: What's happening? Marcus!

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: I can... I've got this.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: You don't. Stop fighting it, lean into the current.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Jade, be careful! The riptide pulls hard!

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: I know what I'm doing. Just help when we reach shore.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: You shouldn't have come in.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Quiet. Breathe. I've got you now.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Come on, come on. You can make it.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: Okay. Okay, I trust you.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Push toward shore, angled. We're almost out.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I've got your hand! Come on!

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: That was... stupid of me.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Yeah. It was. But you're out now.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: That was the bravest thing I've ever seen, Jade.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: It wasn't brave. It was just... I couldn't not.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: You saved my life. I don't forget that.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: You would have done the same for me.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: I don't know if I would have been fast enough.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: We're all here now. That's what matters.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Marcus, you need to rest. Get warm and dry.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: I feel like I owe you everything now.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: You don't owe me anything. This is what people do.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Jade, seriously. That was incredible. You didn't hesitate.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: You have to act when someone's drowning. Think about it after.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: Not many people would do that. You're different.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: You're being modest. I've never seen anything like that.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Everyone would. You would. It's just instinct.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: I need to sit. My legs are... shaking.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Adrenaline. It'll pass. Come up to the shade.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I'll get something warm. Marcus, you okay?

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: Yeah. Just processing that I almost... didn't get out.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: But you did. And now you know the current. Respect it.

dialogue.speaker: marcus
dialogue.line: I respect you. That's what I know right now.
